articles.title: Women who died in sea off Brighton were sisters
articles.description: Paying tribute, their father says "no words can truly describe the pain of losing three daughters".

articles.description: The unarmed Rivet Joint surveillance aircraft was conducting a "routine international flight" during the incidents, the Ministry of Defence says.

articles.title: Fuel duty freeze extended until the end of the year
articles.description: Fuel duty was initially cut by 5p in March 2022, under the Conservative government.

articles.title: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs
articles.description: A minister confirms talks have taken place but says there will be no mandatory cap on essential food prices.
